name: aria
description: GPU-accelerated voice assistant with local STT/TTS and remote LLM

scripts.build: tsc && npm run build:preload && node scripts/copy-renderer.js
scripts.smoke: npm run build && node scripts/smoke-supervisor.js wakeword tts stt
scripts.smoke:stt: npm run build && bash scripts/gen-test-audio.sh && node scripts/smoke-stt.js
scripts.smoke:stt-turn: npm run build && node scripts/smoke-stt-turn.js && python3 scripts/smoke-stt-control.py
scripts.smoke:e2e: npm run build && bash scripts/gen-test-audio.sh && node scripts/smoke-e2e.js
scripts.smoke:boot: npm run build && ARIA_SMOKE=1 electron --no-sandbox dist/main/index.js
scripts.smoke:all: npm run smoke && npm run smoke:tts && npm run smoke:stt && npm run smoke:stt-turn && npm run smoke:resilience && npm run smoke:pdeathsig && npm run smoke:memory && npm run smoke:llm && npm run smoke:llm-models && npm run smoke:router && npm run smoke:local-intents && npm run smoke:tunnel && npm run smoke:session-features && npm run smoke:hardware && npm run smoke:updater && npm run smoke:orb && npm run smoke:ui-stability && npm run smoke:status-dots && npm run smoke:update-progress && npm run smoke:models && npm run smoke:audio && npm run smoke:e2e
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run package:sidecars && npm run package:whisper && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml

author: ARIA Project <aria@localhost>
